sentences.arabic: أَسْهَمَ الْفِيلْمُ السِّينِمَائِيُّ الْعَرَبِيُّ عَلَى مَرِّ الْعُقُودِ فِي تَشْكِيلِ وَعْيِ الْمُجْتَمَعَاتِ وَرَسْمِ صُوَرِ الذَّاتِ الثَّقَافِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Arapski film je tokom decenija doprinosio oblikovanju društvene svijesti i crtanju slika kulturnog identiteta.
sentences.translationEn: Arab cinema has over the decades contributed to shaping social consciousness and drawing images of cultural identity.

sentences.arabic: مِنْ أَفْلَامِ نَجِيبِ مَحْفُوظٍ وَيُوسُفَ شَاهِينَ إِلَى السِّينِمَا اللُّبْنَانِيَّةِ وَالتُّونِسِيَّةِ الرَّائِدَةِ، نَسَجَتِ الشَّاشَةُ الْعَرَبِيَّةُ حِكَايَاتٍ إِنْسَانِيَّةً ذَاتَ رَنِينٍ عَالَمِيٍّ.
sentences.translation: Od filmova Nagiba Mahfuza i Jusufa Šahina do pionirske libansko-tuniske kinematografije, arapski ekran je tkao ljudske priče s globalnim odjekom.
sentences.translationEn: From the films of Naguib Mahfouz and Youssef Chahine to pioneering Lebanese and Tunisian cinema, the Arab screen has woven human stories with global resonance.

sentences.arabic: تُعَانِي الصِّنَاعَةُ مِنْ شُحِّ التَّمْوِيلِ وَضَعْفِ الرِّقَابَةِ النَّقْدِيَّةِ الْمُتَخَصِّصَةِ فِي كَثِيرٍ مِنَ الدُّوَلِ الْعَرَبِيَّةِ رَغْمَ وُجُودِ مَوَاهِبَ أَصِيلَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Industrija pati od nedostatka finansiranja i slabe specijalizovane filmske kritike u mnogim arapskim državama, unatoč prisutnosti autentičnih talenata.
sentences.translationEn: The industry suffers from scarce funding and weak specialised film criticism in many Arab countries despite the presence of authentic talents.

sentences.arabic: غَيْرَ أَنَّ مَهْرَجَانَاتٍ كَمَهْرَجَانِ مَرَّاكُشَ وَأَبُوظَبِي الدَّوْلِيَّيْنِ تَفْتَحُ نَوَافِذَ رَحِيبَةً أَمَامَ الْمُخْرِجِينَ الشَّبَابِ.
sentences.translation: Ipak, festivali poput međunarodnih festivala u Marakešu i Abu Dabiju otvaraju šire horizonte mladim redateljima.
sentences.translationEn: However, festivals such as the Marrakech and Abu Dhabi International Film Festivals open wide horizons for young directors.

sentences.arabic: تَبْقَى السِّينِمَا مِرْآةً لِلْأَحْلَامِ وَالتَّنَاقُضَاتِ الَّتِي يَحْيَاهَا الْإِنْسَانُ الْعَرَبِيُّ الْمُعَاصِرُ.
sentences.translation: Kinematografija ostaje ogledalo snova i proturječja koje doživljava savremeni Arapin.
sentences.translationEn: Cinema remains a mirror of the dreams and contradictions lived by the contemporary Arab.
